violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with a pinkish/orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Egg patties was observed held at (47-48) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Egg patties were placed in the cold drawer 1 hour prior to inspection. PIC moved egg patties to walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Hand sink cold knob was observed with active leak located behind front counter. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. PIC shall send inspector a picture once sink knob is adjusted/fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The floor and ceiling in the front service area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

Multiple foods were observed above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
The lowboy was observed in poor repair. (Iced over, unable to hold adequate temperature.) Unit taken out of service. Service order placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
